component.name: Aether HE
component.summary: Controller for the Aula Win60 HE Hall-effect keyboard

description.p: Desktop controller for the Aula Win60 HE Hall-effect keyboard (VID 0x2E3C, PID 0xC365). Provides per-key and multi-color animated lighting (host streaming at 60 fps), analog actuation with Rapid Trigger, SOCD handling, key remapping, calibration, and an analog-to-virtual-gamepad pipeline that maps Hall-effect key travel onto Xbox 360 sticks and triggers.
The keyboard is accessed over HID (hidraw); the virtual gamepad uses /dev/uinput. Install the bundled udev rules on the host so these nodes are accessible without root.
